introSection:
Speed Roller Coaster is a Zamperla steel flying roller coaster located at Yancheng Chun-Qui Land in Wujin, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China.

The Chinese name for this attraction is 极速飞龙 which translates to Speed Flying Dragon.
fullText:
Speed Roller Coaster is a Zamperla steel flying roller coaster located at Yancheng Chun-Qui Land in Wujin, Changzhou, Jiangsu, China.

The Chinese name for this attraction is 极速飞龙 which translates to Speed Flying Dragon.
